configurations.name: Banana Channels (Container Driven)
configurations.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; DETACH=1 scripts/compose-apps.sh; echo; echo Banana channels are running:; echo API health: http://localhost:8080/health; echo Web app: http://localhost:5173; echo Starting local Electron desktop app...; cd src/typescript/electron; npm run start:ui'
